search_queries_used: site:asahq.org documentation anesthesia care unusual noteworthy events intraoperative
site:doh.gov.ae day surgery intra-procedure records events
site:who.int surgical checklist critical events sign out
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Intraoperative event documentation prompt
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Intraoperative event documentation prompt
rejection_reasons: The event, chronology, response, and outcome must come from the clinician record, not generated text.
The candidate source category "event-specific treatment algorithms" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients receiving procedural or surgical anesthesia when an intraoperative event requires documentation.
setting_applicability: Direct for intraoperative anesthesia records; incident reporting and root-cause review remain separate.
UAE_applicability: International ASA documentation evidence supported by DoH record requirements.
recency_verification: Current ASA 2023 and DoH V1/2024 documents were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer ASA documentation statement or DoH standard was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA statement supports recording unusual or noteworthy intraoperative events, monitoring, interventions, fluids, products, output, and transfer status as facts.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports re-evaluation, equipment, medicines, staff, monitoring, techniques, positioning, lines and procedures, unusual events, fluids or blood products, output, and transfer status as recorded facts.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Intraoperative event documentation prompt; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Event identity, timing, physiologic data, intervention, medicine, device, causality, outcome, disclosure, and incident reporting remain unsupported unless explicitly clinician-entered.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
